text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While having a meeting with Copano Rickey in my
office one day...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, a little. It's been throbbing since this
morning.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
At times like these, feng shui can help me realign
my qi and restore my mind, body, and health!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! I need to purify the northeast direction!
Cleaning time! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Urgh, moving makes my headache way worse...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey continues to suffer from a
headache.
